subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-10 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: In spite of all their awareness, and notwithstanding their quest for peace--knowing as they do that a Perfect Man is needed in this perspicuous age
subcodes.first_line_orig: با این همه آگاهی و صلح جوئی که در این عصر مُبین ظهور انسان کاملی را لازم می‌شمرند
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @station of the Manifestation of God, @innateness; early self-awareness of the Manifestations of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
